narrative.description: Midway's arcade sequel amplifies the original's violence with more characters, babality and friendship finishers, extended combo strings, and the iconic Liu Kang vs Shao Kahn tower climax.
narrative.core_loop: Win rounds with special moves, combos, and block/duck reads, then execute fatalities or mercies on defeated opponents.

mechanics.map_notes: Fatalities, friendships, and babalities execute via memorized inputs at match end.
mechanics.expression: Fatalities, friendships, and babalities execute via memorized inputs at match end.

mechanics.map_notes: Two rounds to win; draining the health bar secures round victory.
mechanics.expression: Two rounds to win; draining the health bar secures round victory.

mechanics.map_notes: Directional sequences execute projectiles, teleports, and unique specials.
mechanics.expression: Directional sequences execute projectiles, teleports, and unique specials.

mechanics.map_notes: Juggle and link combos extend damage off launchers.
mechanics.expression: Juggle and link combos extend damage off launchers.

mechanics.map_notes: Normals and specials telegraph via startup animation.
mechanics.expression: Normals and specials telegraph via startup animation.

mechanics.map_notes: Health depletes from blocked and unblocked hits.
mechanics.expression: Health depletes from blocked and unblocked hits.

mechanics.map_notes: Shao Kahn follows difficulty-scaled pattern loops.
mechanics.expression: Shao Kahn follows difficulty-scaled pattern loops.

mechanics.map_notes: Final tower chains multiple boss fights consecutively.
mechanics.expression: Final tower chains multiple boss fights consecutively.

mechanics.map_notes: Normals and throws anchor the neutral game.
mechanics.expression: Normals and throws anchor the neutral game.

mechanics.map_notes: Continue credits restart the tournament ladder.
mechanics.expression: Continue credits restart the tournament ladder.

mechanics.map_notes: Recovery frames on whiffed specials create punish windows.
mechanics.expression: Recovery frames on whiffed specials create punish windows.

mechanics.map_notes: Hidden characters and alternate finishers extend replay.
mechanics.expression: Hidden characters and alternate finishers extend replay.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Mortal Kombat II through its core fighting loop.
